notes: Difficulty=easy. Culprit 4f3740c1 ('wire up favorites endpoint') adds DAO+view code whose diff runs `SELECT ... FROM dashboard_favorites` but ships NO migration creating that table (files_changed are only dao/dashboard.py + views/dashboard.py, no migration file) -> the first request to /dashboard/favorites after the 11:24 deploy throws sqlalchemy 'relation "dashboard_favorites" does not exist', dashboard-svc 5xx ratio spikes from ~0.003 baseline to 0.74. Fix = ship the missing migration (roll-forward). Decoy 451b1029 ('tweak palette tokens') is a frontend-only theme.ts change deployed 30s later, right at onset on the SAME loud service (dashboard-svc) - a better-surface-match decoy, but its diff only touches CSS color tokens and cannot produce a DB relation error. The error signature points to the SELECT in the DAO diff, which exactly one commit (4f3740c1) introduces. blast_radius empty: dashboard-svc fails standalone, no downstream victims.
